description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted in a seated or crouched posture with both legs bent at the knees and arms extended forward. The figure is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeved top and slim pants, with the clothing closely following the contours of the body. The hands are visible and appear to be open, with fingers slightly splayed, suggesting a relaxed or gesturing motion. The head is slightly tilted, and the facial features are not clearly defined, giving the figure a stylized appearance. The shoes are low-profile and streamlined, consistent with casual or athletic footwear. The overall form is slender and dynamic, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or public spaces.
description: A slender adult figure in a seated or crouched pose, wearing fitted long-sleeve clothing and low-profile shoes, with arms extended forward and hands open.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bent legs, extended arms, and open hands, with the body facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the forward extension of the arms and the pronounced bend at the knees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the curve of the legs, with less detail on the face.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view emphasizing the overall posture and the alignment of the limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top and slim pants
attribute_posture: seated or crouched with arms extended forward
